title: helichrysum glumaceum
intro: Helichrysum glumaceum, also known as the Life Everlasting or Cotte d'Or, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the sunflower family. It is native to South Africa and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and relieving respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy. Helichrysum glumaceum can be prepared into herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
